response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad software experience and strong fundamentals, but the role requires native-level Japanese (not listed), deep C/UNIX systems work with Linux kernel modification, and embedded networking/security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chips). Resume shows primarily web/full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with no embedded firmware, kernel hacking, or network-switch security experience.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across diverse stacks
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling background
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No embedded firmware, Linux kernel modification, or switch/L2-L3 networking experience
No security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, MAC auth)

key_factors.factor: General software engineering breadth and seniority
